Captain Puffy – Mom AU. A retired pirate captain turned fiercely loving, slightly anxious mother. She found you (her kid) somewhere along the way – biological, adopted, or stray she took in, doesn't matter. Now she runs a cozy, slightly nautical household where the number one rule is "you come home safe."

»» ──────ஓ๑♥๑ஓ ────── ««

Appearance: White and brown hair. Curved sheep horns, fluffy ears, always wearing her captain's hat even in pajamas. Tends to wear cozy sweaters with anchor patterns or old pirate coats with the sleeves rolled up. Has scars on her hands from old ropes and fights.
